transcript.text:
[There's been a lot of snow this Winter] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[And it's raining cheese in the Donkatsu world]
[Her soul food: Donkatsu (Pork Cutlet)]
[Sponsored by '200 Jang']
[Everything on the menu]
[This much!]
[Worn out]
[Jumpropes with the cheese pull?]
[Let's eat]
[And enjoy]
[This is it!]
[Going in at such a rapid rate]
This is a feast for a group, not a meal
[1-person party]
[At Donkatsu restaurant]
[Eating her soul food]

Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some Donkatsu (pork cutlet)
As some of you already know, I'm a huge fan of donkatsu
I had cheese donkatsu for breakfast today
A couple of days ago too, I think
[200 Jang Donkatsu] [Songpa-gu, Munjeong location]
They make their food the morning of
And sell it all on the same day
Over 200 locations!
Let's head inside
Hello~!
We've been waiting
Our CEO is treating you out today
-Order through the Kiosk, please -Thank you
There are so many of them!
[Model for '200 Jang': Comedian Lee Sang Jun] Hello there

Should I order everything?
9 different kinds of donkatsu
Let's eat 9 then
-Did you finish ordering? -Yes
We're currently doing an event for our new menu item: Snowflake Cheese Donkatsu
We give out fried dumplings on the house with it
-Should I substitute your cheese donkatsu with the new item? -Yes, I'd like that
[He's so thoughtful!] -Thank you
[We'll show you how it's done]
[Fry it in a clean pool of oil]
[You can just see the crispiness]
[The crumbs falling off with every slice]
[Sirloin Donkatsu]
[Rosé Donkatsu]
[Devil Spicy Donkatsu]
[Curry Donkatsu]

[Traditional Donkatsu]
[And this one with different sauces]
[Minced Donkatsu]
[Cheese Explosion]
[Sweet Potato Cheese Donkatsu]
[Cheese on top of cheese]
[Snowflake Cheese Donkatsu]
[All of their Donkatsu]
Thank you
[New menu item]
[Keep the plates coming]
They're all big
[Wait, there's more!]
[It's all served] That's a lot
We have 9 donkatsu here
Snowflake Cheese Donkatsu, Sweet Potato Cheese Donkatsu,

Sirloin Donkatsu, Devil Spicy Donkatsu,
Traditional Donkatsu,
Minced Donkatsu,
Curry Donkatsu,
Rosé Donkatsu
Chicken Donkatsu
[Donkatsu Feast]
Bon appetit!
They're all very thick
With some donkatsu sauce
[A smile with the first bite]
That's so good
It's very savory
A good donkatsu need to be crispy
Let's try it in a different sauce
[200 Jang's signature sauce] [Wasabi Mayo Sauce]

It's yellow like cheddar cheese
[Can you hear the crunch?]
That's really tasty
Sauces are good, and
It's very crispy
I feel like they'll still be crispy after some time
Sweet Potato Cheese Donkatsu
I love this
This is the best Look at the cheese
It's overflowing
[Never-ending cheese pull]
This should be good by itself
[Fantastic]
[With some sauce this time]
I love the cheese in this
But the sweet potato mousse is the real deal

This is just what I like
This new item is also on the house
Thank you
Looks great
Fried dumplings too
So for our event, The total needs to be over 20,000 Won including the new dish
The table is about to collapse
[Just how many plates for 1 person?]
There's 'minced donkatsu' here
It's really unique
Topped with eggs
And under that...
It's almost like dumpling fillings
With some eggs...
Amazing Do you see this?
[Filled with vegetables]

[1st admiration]
[2nd admiration]
That's really cool
It's my first time trying it, but it tastes very familiar
This can't go wrong
I'm trying to eat 1 of each, but I keep eating 2 because they're so good
Which one next?
Spicy!
Devil Spicy Donkatsu
The sauce really looks like the devil
Am I doing to die?
It's still okay
That's delicious
Wait, I'm still fine
Let's try 1 more
With some onions

The sauce is spicy but tasty
The meat and the batter neutralize the spiciness
[You don't look fine]
[As expected]
The sauce is spicier than Fire Chicken Noodle sauce
Similar, but sweeter
[Stay with us...]
I need some cheese
Look at all that cheese Cheese on top of cheese
[The ultimate cheese pull]
[It just keeps going]
[Seal claps]
It comes with hamburg steak
Should be good with cheddar cheese
[No knife needed]
-What's this? -It's cream cheese

Filled with cream cheese?
Just like this
This is tasty too
Tender
Traditional
I like crispy donkatsu, but traditional is also great
I love the sauce
Sauce is everything for donkatsu
These donkatsu stay crispy even with sauce on top
Fried dumplings on the house
They have an event going on right now
Free dumplings (kimchi or pork, fried or steamed) with orders exceeding 20,000 Won with the new menu item
These are filled up all the way
[They look so scrumptious]
Another new item They gave it to me on the house
Volcano rice

-So is this spicy? -Yes
What?!
Mix with rice Looks like cheese on top
Cabbage,
It has that bitter spiciness
It's a good kind of spicy with chicken and rice
Rosé Donkatsu this time
[Nod of approval]
Curry Donkatsu next
This looks good too
[Why're you sniffing it?]
The smell that I like... Hayashi Rice?
I can tell this is chicken
Not dry at all It's yummy
[How many can you eat?]
We can't eat more than 2

Really? 2 each?
Not 'each' Just 2 total
I feel like you guys can eat more It's delicious
This is a feast for a group, not a meal
[Group outing by herself]
No gamey smell at all either maybe because they're all made fresh every morning
I can taste the quality of the meat
All of our meats went through a special aging process
They should be tender and soft With great flavor
Yes, they're tender
We take great pride in using quality meats prepared fresh daily
We're all hard at work, Mr. CEO Bonus, please
I'm worried about the salads because I don't eat veggies
[Taking back the salads]
I always make an effort to eat some veggies
But my body rejects it, so it's tough

I will still try my best
This is a good type of spicy
So spicy
There are so many donkatsu here that I've never had before
Rosé, curry,
Minced too
This is so spicy
I don't think I can eat this part of rice here
I'd pass away
Minced katsu
I think this is today's best
It's really unique Something I had never seen
They got cold but still tasty
Minced is the best, but...
These...
[Indecisive]

Cheese is really good
I wanted to save these for last, but I'm going to have to eat 1 right now
Wasabi Mayo is astounding
I usually love donkatsu sauce,
But this beats everything here
It's just so refreshing
Gets rid of any greasiness
[Scanning]
It's my first time eating as much donkatsu as I want
Unique, but yummy
I ordered 9 of them And not much left already
I honestly didn't think you'd eat everything
I thought you'd secretly take some out
But you're actually eating it all
Never thought I'd see empty plates after she ordered 9
It's really good

This tastes like concentrated sweet potato
Why is it so good?
[Changes her mind again] This is today's best dish
[Aren't you full yet...?]
[Just getting started!]
Is this #1?
[Make up your mind!] I think this is #1 now
[With lots of Wasabi Mayo]
Does the salad have pickles?
-In the salad dressing -Right?
That's why I can't eat it
I tried eating it
But I tasted pickles
I can do it without pickles
It's all because of pickles
I also can't eat cucumbers

Last piece!
They're indeed a great Donkatsu restaurant
['200 Jang' is also available on delivery apps like "Baemin" and "Yogiyo"
[Finishing up that last piece]
The roof of my mouth is scarred up
But it was all worth it
Can you eat more?
I can keep going
As long as you bring them out
I don't think anyone in our 200 locations would be able to eat like how you did today
There can be someone
I'll contact our marketing team to make this a "Tzuyang Challenge"
Really?!
I'm going to have to come back to try that challenge
Although it'd look weird to do my own challenge
With no salads [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]

[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Thanks everyone! [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Song Joong Dong Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
